profile_state_policy.accepted_for_draft: May inform future deterministic draft suggestions only; never enough for approved ledger write.
profile_state_policy.excluded: Must not affect parser draft behavior except as a suppress/noise marker if a later deterministic validator explicitly uses it.
profile_state_policy.needs_review: Must be routed to exception review or guarded before parser use.

runtime_boundary: Offline profile discovery only. No runtime LLM call, parser implementation, ledger write, CLI export, or approved extraction truth is introduced by this artifact.
